title: Witchcraft & Wizardry
description: All your favorite Magical spells, enchantments, potions, animals and so much more are in a single datapack waiting just for you!
body:
(Full release is coming soon) ### BETA Information This is a beta playtest version and not all features will work all the time.
If you still want to playtest, please report the bugs that you find in the Discord server.

# Witchcraft & Wizardry BETA v1.0.0 Introducing "Witchcraft & Wizardry" Datapack – a magical Minecraft experience that draws inspiration from the enchanting world of Harry Potter and the captivating gameplay of Hogwarts Legacy.
Immerse yourself in a realm of spells, potions, and extraordinary adventures. This datapack introduces a plethora of magical elements to your Minecraft world, allowing you to embrace the life of a wizard or witch. Learn and cast iconic spells, concoct potions at your brewing station, and embark on quests that unravel the secrets of the wizarding world.
With meticulously crafted details and immersive features, "Witchcraft & Wizardry" brings the charm of J.K. Rowling's universe and the excitement of Hogwarts Legacy to your Minecraft gameplay. Explore the seamless functionality in both single-player and multiplayer modes.

## The Map This map (that is coming soon) is based on the Hogwarts Legacy world and features the same quests and lore that fully integrate with the datapack.
**MAP IS COMING SOON**

## Wiki For more detailed information and commands that you can use, head over to the [wiki](https://github.com/Vanderflys/Witchcraft-and-Wizardry/wiki).
